agribalyse.name_en: Cocoa powder, without sugar, powder, instant, non rehydrated

expiration_date: mindestens 4 Monate (112 Tage) ab dem Verkaufsdatum
ingredients_text_en:
cocoa powder, 89%, guarana seed powder 11% 

thank you for your message and your interest in our cocoa powder, 

the fiber content in our koawach cocoa powder is ca, 14 – 35 %, 
the highest fiber content we have in the varieties pure and turmeric,
